description: An empty chamber. Dust settles on cracked stone.
A bare room. Water drips from the ceiling.
Nothing of interest here. Just cold, damp walls.
A silent room. Your torch flickers in the breeze.
You hear growling ahead. Something lurks in the shadows.
The stench of blood hangs in the air.
Bones litter the floor. A creature watches you.
Dark shapes move in the corners of this room.
A golden light emanates from a chest in the center.
Old crates and barrels line the walls. Something glints inside.
A treasure room! Piles of gold dust the floor.
An ornate chest sits on a stone pedestal.
A chest sits alone in the room. Something feels off about it...
A pristine chest catches your eye. Is it breathing?
The chest here looks too perfect. The air feels tense.
You spot a chest. A faint heartbeat echoes through the room.
A merchant waves from behind a makeshift counter.
Torches illuminate a hidden shop. Wares line the shelves.
A cloaked figure beckons you closer. 'I have what you need.'
A figure huddles in the corner. They seem friendly.
A weary traveler rests against the wall.
Someone in shining armor raises a hand in greeting.
The floor tiles here look slightly different...
A thin wire stretches across the doorway.
You notice scratch marks on the walls. Traps?
A spiral staircase descends into darkness below.
Stone steps lead down. Cold air rises from the depths.
A shaft in the floor reveals a ladder going deeper.
The ground trembles. A massive presence awaits below.
The air is thick with dread. This is no ordinary room.
Dragon bones line the walls. The boss lurks nearby.
A massive iron door with a skeleton-shaped keyhole seals the passage below.
Iron bars block a staircase downward. A skeleton lock holds them shut.
A reinforced door blocks the way. The keyhole is shaped like a skull.
Ancient iron bars block a descending stairway. They radiate cold energy.

lore_notes: Scratched into the wall: "The Grail does not give. It takes."
A faded note on the floor: "I wished. I regretted. I came back. I wished again."
Words carved into stone: "Valdris fell because one man wanted power. The Grail obliged."
A torn journal page: "The dragon was once a man. The man was once a king. The king was once a hero."
A message in old ink: "If you find this, do not wish. Destroy the Grail."
A scratched tally mark with a note: "Cycle 47. I think this is cycle 47."
A weathered scroll: "The paladins prayed. The god was silent. The paladins stopped praying."
A crumpled letter: "I don't remember writing this. I don't remember my name."
Words painted in something dark: "Every adventurer who came here before you made a wish. None of them left."
A broken tablet: "Kaelan opened the gates. The dragon entered. The kingdom ended. The Grail... watched."
